constraint_set.description: Balanced complete street with dedicated furnishing strips and moderate amenity density.
constraint_set.name: balanced_complete_street_v1

rules.description: Keep the template street within a compact complete-street lane count.
rules.name: max_lane_count

rules.description: Maintain a usable pedestrian clear path on both sides.
rules.name: min_clear_path_width

rules.description: Reserve a furnishing strip so assets do not spill into the clear path.
rules.name: min_furnishing_width

rules.description: Keep furnishing strips within a moderate width budget so the row does not collapse into a single dominant edge.
rules.name: max_furnishing_width

rules.description: Keep the full street row within the available right-of-way budget.
rules.name: row_width_budget

rules.description: The clear path must support baseline pedestrian throughput.
rules.name: pedestrian_throughput_floor

rules.description: The carriageway must support baseline vehicle throughput.
rules.name: vehicle_throughput_floor

rules.description: The left clear path must remain directly adjacent to the furnishing edge.
rules.name: left_clear_path_adjacent_furnishing

rules.description: The left clear path must separate furnishing from the carriageway.
rules.name: left_clear_path_separates_furnishing_and_carriageway

rules.description: Avoid placing benches directly inside entrance clear zones.
rules.name: bench_entrance_keepout

rules.description: Balanced streets should keep optional bench density moderate.
rules.name: balanced_bench_cap

rules.description: Street furniture should occupy furnishing, transit-edge, or designated sidewalk bands, not the carriageway.
rules.name: furniture_buffer_allocation
